name: dispatch
description: | Use when a task file exists in .hyperflow/tasks/ and workers need dispatching. Fans out parallel Sonnet workers under per-batch Opus reviewers, runs a final integration review, and commits per sub-task. Endpoint of the auto-chain — no auto-deploy. Trigger with /hyperflow:dispatch, "run the plan", "execute the task", "build it", "run the batches".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 适合在已有任务规划文件后，自动派发多个并行子任务执行、分批由审阅者把关，最后整合审查并按子任务提交代码，省去手动协调多轮开发的麻烦。
